fields.name: message
fields.label: Main Consent Message
fields.defaultValue: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your experience, analyze site performance, personalize content, and serve relevant advertisements.

fields.name: analyticsDesc
fields.label: Analytics Cookies Description
fields.defaultValue: These cookies help us understand how visitors use our website and improve performance (e.g., Google Analytics).

fields.name: marketingDesc
fields.label: Marketing Cookies Description
fields.defaultValue: These allow us and our partners to show you relevant advertisements based on your interests.

fields.name: personalizationDesc
fields.label: Personalization Cookies Description
fields.defaultValue: These enable tailored content and experiences, such as recommendations (e.g., Adobe Target).

fields.name: thirdPartyDesc
fields.label: Third-Party Cookies Description
fields.defaultValue: Used by social media and partners for sharing, login, and embedded content.

fields.name: functionalDesc
fields.label: Functional Cookies Description
fields.defaultValue: These remember your preferences (language, region, etc.) to make your visit more convenient.
